title: Simple Copper Armor and Tools
description: Adds balanced copper tools, armor, and horse armor to Minecraft! Copper Horse Armor can also be found in chests!
body:
Adds balanced copper tools, armor, and horse armor to Minecraft! These items are intended to be a "heavier" substitute for stone/chainmail gear. The armor (which is trimmable) is slightly better than chainmail, while the tools have a slower swing rate but deal more damage than their stone counterparts.

The copper horse armor is not craftable, however, can be found in certain structure chests.

![A showcase of copper tools, horse armor, as well as trimmed and untrimmed copper armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GyygchZm/images/39d32ccae3b18432641b585c697e9c1663e7ac79.png)

# [Also see Simple Emerald Armor and Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-emerald-armor-and-tools)
